word: H797 - אַשְׁדֹּודִית - ʼAshdôwdîyth - ash-do-deeth' - In the speech of Ashdod

sections.paragraph:
Original: אשׁדּודית

Transliteration: 'ashdôdı̂yth

Phonetic: ash-do-deeth'

BDB Definition:

Ashdodites = "I will spoil"
  1. language of Ashdod

Origin: feminine of H796

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Adverb
